valid.name: Sychronizing with external system
Using props to call an external function
Opaque external state guard

invalid.name: Using state to handle an event and call an external function
Using state to handle an event, no deps argument
Using state to handle an event, empty deps
Using state to handle an event and call a prop
Early return in if test
invalid.divergenceReason: react-doctor skips IF tests with pure side-effect-free early-exit consequents (`if (!x) return;`) — these are the canonical 'guard' idiom rather than the event-handler-in-disguise antipattern. Upstream flags them; we don't.

invalid.name: Member access and double test in condition
invalid.divergenceReason: react-doctor dedupes diagnostics by RESOLVED BINDING (not by individual identifier reference). The IF references `dataToSubmit` twice (`dataToSubmit.name && dataToSubmit.name.length`) — upstream emits 2 errors, we emit 1 (same logical issue, deduped).

invalid.name: If test includes non-state
